name: hyring-mcp
description: Hyring AI hiring suite — AI Video Interviewer (One-Way & Two-Way), AI Coding Interviewer, English Proficiency Test, AI Phone Screener, AI Resume Screener, Virtual Interview Platform.
long_description:
A single MCP extension that exposes the full Hyring recruitment platform inside Claude. Build and publish assessments, invite candidates, and review candidate reports across all seven Hyring products:

- AI Video Interviewer (One-Way)
- AI Video Interviewer (Two-Way)
- AI Coding Interviewer
- English Proficiency Test
- AI Phone Screener
- AI Resume Screener
- Virtual Interview Platform

Authenticates with your Hyring employer account via email OTP on first use.
